Our Story

Serving Osogbo's
Favourite Shawarma

Born in the heart of Osogbo, Affordable Xpress Shawarma has been serving hot, delicious, and pocket-friendly wraps since 2019. We believe great food shouldn't cost a fortune — that's why our shawarma starts at just ₦800.

From our signature beef and chicken wraps to our legendary Suya Shawarma, every item is prepared fresh to order using quality ingredients. We deliver FREE anywhere within Osogbo — fast, hot, and right to your door.

🌯
Fresh Made Daily
Every wrap is prepared fresh to order. No pre-made, no reheating.
🚚
Free Delivery
We deliver FREE within Osogbo. Fast, hot and right to your door.
💰
Affordable Prices
Starting from ₦800. Quality food that doesn't break the bank.
⭐

Over 55 happy reviews on Google. Trusted by Osogbo.
